aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to insufficient content depth, lack of structured data, and minimal authority signals.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not optimized and is currently invisible to Google AI.
critical_issues: Missing photos, posts, and Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Focus on expanding citations to industry-specific directories

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and insufficient content depth

ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema markup

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for Answer Engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is not found, and their website lacks the structured data needed for AI to recognize them as a local authority.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, GBP optimization, and conversational content to make their business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Cary, NC
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants like ChatGPT and Google AI.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
